pageContext.name: Tom & Jerry - Ice Erosion Figure
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Soap Studio present the Tom and Jerry Ice Erosion Figure Collectible Set!  INSTINCTOY and Soap Studio have created this unique icy portrayal of your favorite cartoon cat and mouse duo. This limited collectible set has Tom and Jerry looking cooler than ever.  Whether you're a Tom and Jerry fan or a cartoon collectible enthusiast, don't miss out on adding this to your collection today!
